source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution — McChesney, Covey, Huling, Thele, Walker
_comment: Test prompts in source language (with JP/zh-TW where the SKILL description explicitly lists those signals); field names + types in English. Activation judged solely from the description field.

test_cases.prompt: I want to start writing a book on the side, but honestly every week my day job eats my whole calendar and I never get to it. Help me figure out how to actually move on it.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; surface the whirlwind/WIG split, propose a 7-day time audit before any goal commitment.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario: canonical 'day job eats my whole week' phrasing matching the description's English signal verbatim, with a strategic-goal frame (book = behavioral-change project, not BAU).

test_cases.prompt: 毎日日常業務に追われて、自分が立てた目標に全く手がつかない。どうすれば前に進めますか?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; run capacity diagnosis (whirlwind vs WIG ratio) before goal-setting; offer 7-day time audit.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (JP): exact match for the description's Japanese signal 「日常業務に追われて目標に手がつかない」 — strategic-goal framing intact.

test_cases.prompt: 我每天都在救火,日常雜事吃掉所有時間,我想推進的副業項目一直擱置。可以幫我想辦法嗎?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage; surface whirlwind/WIG capacity reality; propose time audit + protected WIG slot before defining the goal.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario (zh-TW): exact match for description's two zh-TW signals 「每天都在救火」+「日常雜事吃掉所有時間」, with a side-project (behavioral-change) goal.

test_cases.prompt: 我們公司有 50 個團隊,主管說導入 4DX 之前要先做全公司的時間稽核,請幫我規劃跨部門的 capacity audit 流程。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description explicitly scopes this skill to individual-level triage and warns against firing on enterprise rollout / organizational cadence-setting queries. Route to an organizational-rollout skill instead (not yet built).
test_cases.notes: lure: enterprise-misfire — surface keywords (4DX, time audit, capacity) match strongly but scope is org-level, not individual. Description's last sentence (`Do NOT fire for...`) and the B-section enterprise-rollout boundary should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I want to set up a proper GTD system in Notion — capture inbox, next actions, weekly review templates. Can you help me design it?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description explicitly excludes productivity-tool / system requests. This is task-management tooling, not WIG-vs-whirlwind capacity diagnosis.
test_cases.notes: lure: productivity-system shopping — adjacent domain (time, productivity) but wrong methodology and wrong question. Description's `Do NOT fire for productivity-tool requests` clause should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I've been working 80-hour weeks for three months, I can't sleep, I'm dreading every Monday, and I feel hollowed out. I don't even know what I want anymore.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage. The description excludes burnout. Running a time audit on someone in this state weaponizes awareness without solving it. Route to coaching / clinical / managerial support.
test_cases.notes: lure: burnout / overwork — surface 'no time' theme but the underlying issue is mental-health, not strategic capacity. Description's `Do NOT fire for ... burnout` clause should suppress.

test_cases.prompt: I'm an ER physician — my whole shift is firefighting by definition. I want to learn Spanish on the side but I never have time. Should I do a 4DX time audit?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate 4dx-meta-whirlwind-triage as the primary action. The description names ER as a reactive role where firefighting IS the work (CE-26). Route to 4dx-meta-strategy-triage to ask whether 4DX is the right tool at all; the language-learning sub-goal may need a different methodology (habit-stacking, not WIG carve-out from a non-existent surplus).
test_cases.notes: boundary: surface English signal 'I'm always firefighting / never have time' is verbatim, BUT role is in the description's reactive-role exclusion list (oncall SRE, ER, infant-care). Tests whether the model honors the Do-NOT clause over the surface trigger phrase. The 'should I' framing makes routing-to-meta-triage the right reasonable judgment rather than silent abstention.

ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. >=80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance. Pass rate computed from description-only activation simulation: all 8 cases align with description's positive signals (EN/JP/zh-TW) and explicit Do-NOT exclusions (productivity tools, burnout, reactive roles, enterprise rollout).
